transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?

transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your total outstanding is fifty thousand rupees. But we can remove all charges and close your loan at just thirty five thousand rupees. Would you like to discuss how to resolve this today?

This saves you a significant amount because we remove the extra charges. Could you tell me a little bit about what's been holding you back from making payments on the loan?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great.

transcript.speaker: agent

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, Priya Sharma. I'm here. I was just checking your account. As I mentioned, the total outstanding amount is fifty thousand rupees, but you have the option to close it at thirty five thousand rupees. This means you save the difference. What are your thoughts on this?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I understand there were some connectivity issues. Can you hear me clearly now?

transcript.text: Yes. Okay. Yeah. Yeah. I can hear you. If I pay XX,XXX means that outstanding will be removed.

transcript.text: Okay. Yes, if you pay the thirty five thousand rupees, your outstanding will be cleared, and your loan will be closed. Would you like to proceed with that?

transcript.text: you please share more details about it? Because I don't I mean, currently, I don't have XX,XXX.

transcript.text: I understand, Priya. What amount would be manageable for you right now, or when do you think you could arrange for the payment?

transcript.text: Got it. So, you'd like us to call you back towards the end of the month when you'll have the funds ready. I've scheduled a callback for you then.

transcript.text: That sounds good, Priya. So, we'll schedule a callback for the end of the month, and I'll be sure to have all the figures ready for you then regarding the thirty five thousand rupees closure amount. If you need anything before then, please feel free to call.

params.root_cause: Echo during call, not able to understand clearly, so asked to explain again

params.reason: customer will have funds by month end

analysis.summary: The customer confirmed understanding of the discounted loan closure offer. They cannot pay the XX,XXX rupees immediately due to lack of funds, but expressed intent to make the payment by the end of the month and requested a callback then.
